name: coffee-brand
description: A visually expressive brief on the ultra-cheap / budget tier — can small models still produce a bold, characterful design? 3-column full-page grid.
systemPrompt: You are an award-winning brand and web designer. Output a single, self-contained HTML document with embedded CSS (Google Fonts via <link> are allowed). Be bold and characterful — strong color, expressive typography, real visual hierarchy.
prompt: Design a striking single-page website for a fictional artisanal coffee brand called 'Ember'. Include a full-bleed hero with the brand name, an evocative tagline and a 'Shop beans' call-to-action, a short brand story section, a 3-up grid of signature roasts with names and tasting notes, and a footer with newsletter signup. Use a warm, premium palette and confident typography. Return ONLY a single complete HTML document.
